title: The Grinding Table - Dark Mode
description: Dark Mode for The Grinding Table Datapack.
body:
A simple add-on pack for [The Grinding Table](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-grinding-table) that makes the GUI use a darker palette.

Make sure to put this pack **over** the TGT Resourcepack, otherwise it won't work!

Based on the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) Dark UI Resourcepack.
